name: Cinnamon-Apple Toppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread each melba round thinly with margarine; sprinkle approximately half of the cinnamon-sugar on top.
2. Place 2 overlapping apple slices over the cinnamon-sugar.
3. Sprinkle the remaining cinnamon-sugar over the apples.
4. Arrange 6 toasts in a microwave-safe dish.
5. Microwave on High (100%) until the apples are tender, about 1 minute.
6. Repeat with the remaining snacks.
Makes 12 servings. Preparation time: About 7 minutes. Microwave time: About 1 minute.
